name: Coffee Chip Drops
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Place sheets of foil on the countertop for cooling cookies.
In a large bowl, combine the brown sugar, shortening, coffee, and vanilla extract. Beat on medium speed of an electric mixer until blended.
Add the egg; beat well. In another bowl, mix together the flour, ground coffee, salt, and baking soda.
Combine this mixture with the shortening mixture; beat on low speed just until blended.
Stir in the chocolate chips and walnuts. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake one baking sheet at a time for 8 to 10 minutes, or until cookies are lightly browned and just set. Do not overbake.
Place one candy in the center of each cookie. Cool on the baking sheets for 2 minutes, then remove to the foil to cool completely.
